author: lOrm
content: Added send_or_warn() helper that detects channel-closed (Esc pressed / app shutting down) on SyncMessages/ResponseDone/ApiError sends. On failure: (a) tracing::warn! with event descriptor + session_id, (b) for SyncMessages persists the orphaned session_messages vector to {data_dir}/openclaudia/orphan-turns/{session_id}-{ts}.json so the next run can recover. Wired through run_api_turn_async (extracted handle_turn_result helper to stay under 100-line lint) and run_agentic_loop.
